name: greenhouse
shortDescription: Greenhouse is a simple text scrolling handler (pager) for terminal programs.
description:
The idea is that it can be set a region to do its scrolling and paging
job and then the user can draw whatever outside it.
This reduces code duplication for the message viewer
and flowerbook.

docs.name: updateSpecial
description: This function will be called when the special page
is on and needs to be updated.
